version_description: Lines 25-40 have been corrected to the corresponding tab with the intro. It is well demarcated to the according auto scroll timing.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
*Take some time to play with the beat. Meant for more of an acoustic version rather than a fast rap pace.
The intro is tabbed out into 3 different sections indicated by where to play each with #1-#3 


[tab]Intro #1
e|------------|----------14------|
B|-(14)5x-----|-14-17-14---------| 2x
G|------------|------------------|
D|------------|------------------|
A|------------|------------------|
E|------------|------------------|[/tab]

[tab]Intro #2
e|-------------14------17-16-----|-------------17--16-----------|
B|-14--17--14--------------------|-14--17--14----------17-------| 2x
G|-------------------------------|------------------------------|
D|-------------------------------|------------------------------|
A|-------------------------------|------------------------------|
E|-------------------------------|------------------------------|[/tab]

[tab]Intro #3
e|-------------------------------|
B|-14--17--14--19----------------|
G|-------------------------------|
D|------------|------------------|
A|------------|------------------|
E|------------|------------------|[/tab]

[#1]
Yeah
Thank you, thank you, thank you
You're far too kind
Haha
[#1]
Uh, yeah
Ready'
Let's go

[#1]
Can I get a encore' Do you want more'
                     [#2]
Cookin' raw with the Brooklyn boy
So, for one last time, I need y'all to roar
[#1]
Now, what the hell are you waiting for'
                        [#2]
After me, there shall be no more
So, for one last time, nigga, make some noise
         [#3]
Get 'em, Jay

[tab] [ch]F#m[/ch]
Who you know fresher than Hov' Riddle me that[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
The rest of y'all know where I'm lyrically at[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]
Can't none of y'all mirror me back[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]
Yeah, hearin' me rap is like hearin' G. Rap in his prime[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F#m[/ch]
I'm young H.O.: Rap's Grateful Dead[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
Back to take over the globe'now break bread[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]
I'm in Boeing jets, Global Express[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]
Out the country but the blueberry still connect[/tab]


[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
On the low but the yacht got a triple deck[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]
But when you young what the fuck you expect' (yep, yep)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#m[/ch]
Grand openin''grand closin'[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]
God damn, your man Hov cracked the can open again[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
Who you gon' find doper than him with no pen'[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]
Just draw off inspiration[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#m[/ch]
Soon you gon' see you can't replace him (him)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]
With cheap imitations for these generations[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]
Can I get a encore' Do you want more'[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]
Cookin' raw with the Brooklyn boy[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]                                          [ch]E[/ch]
So, for one last time, I need y'all to roar[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#m[/ch]
Now, what the hell are you waiting for'[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]
After me, there shall be no more[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]                                           [ch]E[/ch]
So, for one last time, nigga, make some noise[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]  N.C.  
What the hell are you waiting for[/tab]

[tab] [ch]A[/ch]
Look what you made me do, look what I made for you[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]
Knew if I paid my dues how will they pay you'[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#m[/ch]
When you first come in the game they try to play you[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
Then you drop a couple of hits'look how they wave to you[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]
From Marcy to Madison Square[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]
To the only thing that matters in just a matter of years (yeah)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#m[/ch]
As fate would have it Jay's status appears[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                                           [ch]A[/ch]
To be at an all-time high'perfect time to say goodbye[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]E[/ch]
When I come back like Jordan wearin' the four-five[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]D[/ch]
It ain't to play games with you[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]E[/ch]
It's to aim at you'probably maim you[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]F#m[/ch]
If I owe you I'll blow you to smithereens[/tab]

Cocksucka', take one for your team
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
And I need you to remember one thing (one thing)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
I came, I saw, I conquered[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]
From record sales to sold-out concerts[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]
So mo'fucka', if you want this encore[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A[/ch]
I need you to scream 'til your lungs get sore[/tab]

[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
 I'm tired of being what you want me to be[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
 Feeling so faithless, lost under the surface[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
 Don't know what you're expecting of me[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]E[/ch]
 Put under the pressure, of walking in your shoes[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]E[/ch]
 Caught in the undertow / We're just caught in the undertow[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
 Every step that I take is another mistake to you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
 Caught in the undertow / We're just caught in the undertow[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F#m[/ch]                        [ch]A[/ch]
 And every second I waste is more than I can take[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#m[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
 I've become so numb, i can't feel you there[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
 Become so tired, so much more aware[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
 I'm becoming this, all I want to do[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]
 Is be more like me, and be less like you[/tab]

[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
I've become so numb[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]E[/ch]
Can I get a encore' Do you want more' (more)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
I've become so numb[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
